assumptions_confirmed: root-cause PAT expiry or invalidation in Firefly profile — container PAT is present (980 chars) but Firefly rejects with 302->login, consistent with expired/revoked PAT; verify after regen and .env update.
assumption_confirmation_quoted: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <PAT>" http://firefly:8080/api/v1/about -> HTTP 302 redirecting to /login -> app follows redirect -> Firefly /login HTML returns 200 but app sync layer sees 401 upstream; PAT has expired or been invalidated in Firefly profile.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Firefly sync all scheduled + manual runs return status failed error_message unexpected status 401 Unauthorized; mirror data is stale since deploy 2026-06-16.

FIREFLY_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN length 980 non-empty; FIREFLY_BASE_URL=http://firefly:8080; container financegoblin-flow-finance-ai-1; curl 302->login on Bearer PAT; GET /api/v1/sync/status state failed; Docker network traefik; omniflow external profile.
BUG-0002 sub-defect C covered similar 401/PAT-empty case; this is a new recurrence after deploy on 2026-06-16 (token existed but now invalid in Firefly profile).

After regenerating PAT in Firefly profile and updating FIREFLY_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env + recreating container, GET /api/v1/sync/status shows state completed after next scheduled run; manual Sync now returns status completed with non-zero entity counts; no error_message containing 401 or Unauthorized.

App surfaces clear user-facing diagnosis on /sync when PAT auth fails (distinguishing PAT expired/invalid from PAT missing and Firefly unreachable); live Firefly mirror reflects current data; >=3 subsequent scheduled syncs succeed (no silent 401 recurrence); OIDC-enabled and omniflow external deploy regression checks pass.
